As a 'Business Development & Client Coordination Intern' at Bedi and Associates, you will get the opportunity to work in a chartered accountancy firm and closely interact with experienced professionals in the fields of taxation, accounting, GST, audit, corporate compliance, and business advisory.

A Chartered Accountant (CA) is a qualified finance and compliance professional who advises individuals, businesses, startups, companies, and other entities on matters relating to Income Tax, GST, accounting, audit, financial reporting, company law, regulatory compliance, and strategic financial decisions. In practice, Chartered Accountants are trusted professional advisors who help clients manage both legal compliance and commercial matters in an organized and efficient manner.

This internship will give you exposure not only to sales and lead generation but also to how a professional advisory firm builds trust, handles clients, understands business problems, and converts requirements into long-term professional relationships.

You will work under the guidance of the 'Proprietor/Senior Chartered Accountant' and will report directly on lead generation, client follow-ups, digital outreach, and business development activities.



1. Assist in generating business leads for services such as income tax filing, GST compliance, company incorporation, ROC compliance, accounting, audit, advisory, and related professional services. 
2. Support social media, email, and digital outreach initiatives to improve visibility of the firm and generate prospective client interest. 
3. Conduct market research to identify potential clients, industries, business owners, startups, professionals, and referral sources who may require CA-related services. 
4. Handle first-level communication with prospective clients through calls, emails, WhatsApp, and follow-ups professionally and courteously. 
5. Coordinate appointments, meetings, and discussions between potential clients and the senior chartered accountant. 
6. Maintain lead trackers, follow-up sheets, enquiry records, and business development reports in an organized manner. 
7. Assist in nurturing leads and supporting the conversion of enquiries into clients through timely communication and structured follow-up. 
8. Support the preparation and sharing of introductory service information, profiles, and proposal communication as instructed by the management. 
 
If you are looking for an opportunity to learn how a professional firm grows, communicates with clients, and builds lasting business relationships under the guidance of a Senior Chartered Accountant, this internship at Bedi and Associates can be a valuable stepping stone in your career.

title: Hybrid Bioinformatics & AI (Integrated Cohort, Ultraceuticals)
description:
This is an integrated, cohort‑based internship where we intentionally mix Bio/Biotech/Bioinformatics students with AI/ML/Computer Science students. Bio‑leaning interns will gain exposure to real AI and software practices, while AI‑leaning interns will gain exposure to real biological problems and datasets. You will work together on common Enformis modules, so that each side learns from the other while contributing their strengths to Ultraceuticals’ AI‑driven drug discovery platforms.

 

1. Collaborating within a mixed cohort of bio‑leaning and AI‑leaning interns to design and execute analyses that power the Enformis platform at Ultraceuticals, including dataset preparation, feature engineering, and exploratory data analysis on biological/clinical‑like data.
2. Taking ownership of tasks aligned with your current strengths (either bioinformatics/domain understanding or AI/ML/Data engineering), while actively learning from the other track to build end‑to‑end workflows (from biological problem framing to model implementation and evaluation).
3. Building and maintaining clean, reproducible code and notebooks in Python for data processing and ML experiments; documenting your work so it can be integrated into Enformis and related internal tools.
4. Participating in weekly hybrid sprints (online stand-ups and periodic in‑person workshops in Bengaluru) for architecture discussions, code reviews, and cross‑learning sessions where bio interns explain the biology and AI interns explain the models.
5. Preparing short technical summaries and presentations of your work for internal stakeholders, contributing to Ultraceuticals’ broader efforts in AI‑driven drug discovery and computational biology.

title: Machine Learning
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and technically sound Machine Learning & LLM Engineering Intern with a keen interest in Large Language Models (LLMs), RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines, and end-to-end ML solution development. This is a hands-on internship ideal for individuals looking to gain deep exposure to cutting-edge AI systems and contribute meaningfully to real-world ML applications.

Key Responsibilities
• Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning solutions, with a primary
focus on LLMs.
• Build modular, reusable, and production-grade Python codebases.
• Develop Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases for
efficient information retrieval.
• Work with relational (Postgres, MySQL) and non-relational (MongoDB) databases.
• Extract and process data (text/images) from PDFs using open-source Python libraries.
• Evaluate and integrate open-source and licensed LLMs into production workflows.
• Fine-tune open-source LLMs for domain-specific use cases.
• Configure and optimize hardware infrastructure for on-premises LLM deployment.
• Stay abreast of industry developments in LLM technologies and contribute to solution innovation.

Qualifications
• Pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's/Master’s in Computer Science, Artificial
Intelligence, Machine Learning, or related fields.
• Minimum 3 months of experience in building and deploying machine learning
models.
• Proficiency in Python, with experience in writing clean, modular, and scalable code.
• Familiarity with building RAG pipelines and working with vector databases.
• Solid understanding of LLMs and their applications in NLP and information retrieval.
• Practical knowledge of ML use cases like translation, speech recognition, and image
processing.
• Experience with Postgres, MySQL, and/or MongoDB.
• Understanding of infrastructure setup for LLM deployment.
• Knowledge of LLM fine-tuning and prompt engineering is a plus.

Preferred Skills (Bonus)
• Familiarity with libraries like Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, Haystack, or
similar.
• Understanding GPU-based model deployment and performance optimization.
• Exposure to containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).

title: Prompt Engineering
description:
You will be building the intelligence layer of AI-driven regulatory compliance agents for product compliance and certification for the automotive industry. This means translating dense regulatory documents — clauses, formulas, reference tables, test procedures — into structured prompts that LLM agents can execute reliably and accurately.



1. Writing extraction prompts that pull typed field values from parsed markdown into JSON schemas, handling enum normalisation, unit conversion, and conditional field logic.
2. Writing compliance evaluation prompts that execute clause-by-clause regulatory checks against confirmed values and document evidence, with precise citation formats, status rewrite enforcement, and fallback handling.
3. Diagnosing prompt failures from session traces — identifying whether the root cause is a citation format issue, a status rewrite failure, a template bracket not substituted, a fallback disclosed in output, or a table lookup returning wrong data.
4. Maintaining a clause-level test suite — running sessions against sample documents, checking every clause status against its citation, and iterating until the full checklist passes cleanly.
5. Versioning prompts and documenting changes — what broke, what the root cause was, what the fix was, and whether the fix introduced new failure modes.
6. Building prompt libraries for new regulations by following the framework — mapping document types, defining field schemas, writing section evaluation prompts, and testing against real submissions.

title: 2D Game Concept Artist (Interactive)
description:
NOTE: This is NOT a Graphic/UI/Web Design role.  
 
We’re looking for a 2D game concept artist to design characters, environments, and visual worlds for interactive game experiences. 
You’ll define themes, color systems, and how players visually experience each game - not just create standalone artwork. 
 
GAME ART PORTFOLIO REQUIRED: You should have a portfolio that includes character and/or environment concepts. We’re specifically looking for candidates who have already explored game art or interactive visual experiences. 
 
Location: Bangalore (Hybrid: 1 - 2 days/week preferred) 
 
About ImmersiWorks Games: 
At ImmersiWorks Games, we build immersive, real-world (phygital) game experiences where players use their bodies as the controller, combining physical movement with digital gameplay through projectors and depth sensors in a shared space. These are short, high-energy multiplayer experiences designed to be intuitive, social, and engaging from the very first interaction. 
 
What You’ll Do:
Concept & Visual Thinking
1. Design game themes, environments, characters, and props 
2. Define color palettes and visual styles 
3. Create moodboards and explore different visual directions 
 
Game Art (2D) 
Create: 
1. Characters, enemies, collectibles 
2. Environment elements 
3. UI elements 
4. Ensure visuals are: Clear and readable 
5. Suitable for gameplay 
 
Environment & Depth 
1. Design layered scenes (foreground, midground, background) 
2. Think about parallax and depth to make 2D feel spatial 
3. Create environments that feel immersive, not flat 
 
� Animation (Basic) 
Create: - Basic character animations (walk, idle, reactions) - Gameplay effects (hits, bursts, motion cues) - Simple transitions 
Focus on: Clarity, Responsiveness, Playfulness 
Focus on functionality and player feedback, not complex animation 
 
Experience Thinking 
Think beyond assets: 
1. What the player sees 
2. What they feel 
3. What they do next 


Who Should Apply 
MUST HAVE - Strong drawing / illustration fundamentals - Ability to design both characters AND environments - Understanding of depth, layering, and parallax - Interest in games / interactive experiences - Willingness to learn and work with game engines (Unity or similar) - Ability to think about how art translates into interactive gameplay 

GOOD TO HAVE 
1. Exposure to game art (sprites, UI, environments) 
2. Basic 2D animation skills 
3. Basic familiarity with Unity or any game engine 
4. Understanding of how assets are used in games 
5. Experience with AI tools for art exploration 
6. Portfolio showing: Style consistency, Not just standalone artwork

� Tools (any subset is fine) 
1. Photoshop / Illustrator 
2. After Effects 
3. Blender 
4. Any AI tools (Midjourney, etc.) 

What You’ll Learn:
1. How to design visual systems for games 
2. How art impacts real player interaction 
3. How to go from: Concept → Gameplay → Experience - Working in a fast, iterative game environmen

title: Python Systems Engineer
description:
About Us

Technoculture Research is re-imagining how the world measures health. We build micro-scale electrochemical laboratories that place lab-grade accuracy directly in the hands of clinicians, community health workers, and even patients at home. Our platform fuses microfabricated electrodes, novel surface chemistries, and microfluidics to run protein, nucleic-acid, and metabolite assays within minutes. By replacing costly optical detection with electron sensing, we slash instrument and per- test costs by roughly an order of magnitude, making precision diagnostics truly accessible. Our mission is clear: make diagnostics abundant so that every critical health decision is guided by immediate, affordable results, wherever care happens. Website: www.technoculture.io

Job Description

We are seeking a Python Systems Engineer with strong expertise in multithreading, multiprocessing, asynchronous programming, and systems integration. The candidate should have hands-on experience in developing Python CLIs, REST APIs, and working with large Python repositories. Familiarity with hardware interfaces and inter-process communication (IPC) mechanisms is preferred. A passion for building robust, scalable, and efficient systems is essential.
Responsibilities

1. Design, develop, and debug multithreaded and multiprocessing Python applications.
2. Implement and optimise IPC mechanisms, including sockets, queues, and shared memory.
3. Wrap synchronous Python code with asynchronous interfaces where required.
4. Develop Python-based CLIs and REST APIs for system control and communication.
5. Work across large, modular Python codebases and contribute to scalable microservices.
6. Implement communication using gRPC and Protocol Buffers.
7. Interface with hardware using protocols such as GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, and CAN bus.
8. Use Git, GitHub, and CI/CD pipelines for development and deployment workflows.
9. Operate efficiently within Linux environments, using shell tools (SSH, scripting, etc.).

title: PHP Development
description:
ALL OF THE BELOW ARE A MUST  DO NOT APPLY IF YOU HAVE NEVER DONE PHP IMPLEMENTATION!!!

This is a high-discipline, mission-critical role. We are looking for an professional grade intern, not a Hobbyist. If you rely on AI to write your logic or cannot adhere to a strict professional schedule, do not apply.
​Non-Negotiable Professional Standards
​Operating Hours: 08:00 AM – 5:30 ICT (non-negotiable). Immediate responsiveness is required during these hours. "Disappearing" without status updates is grounds for immediate termination. 12:00 to 1:00 PM is lunch hour. 
​Environment Protocol: Unauthorized compression, zipping, or downloading of project files from the remote server is strictly prohibited.
​Focus: This role requires deep-work concentration. Late-night, "rushed" sessions are not permitted.
​The 5 Essential "Must-Have" Competencies
​Failure to demonstrate deep, manual PHP implementation in any of the following will result in disqualification:
​Payment gateways: Native PHP integration of payment gateways (Stripe/PayPal/Local) specifically for recurring billing and subscription state management. You must understand webhooks and ledger consistency.
​Legacy Project Logic: The ability to step into an existing, complex codebase, map the logic, and perform rapid, non-destructive debugging. No "sloppy" patches; we require thorough, documented fixes.
​Database Optimization (AJAX): Expert-level implementation of dynamic AJAX search scripts. You must be able to fetch and render high volume of DB records with zero latency and high security (SQL injection prevention).
​Third-Party API Architecture: Deep experience connecting disparate systems via PHP. You must be comfortable handling authentication, rate-limiting, and data-mapping for external APIs.
​UI/UX Logic & System Design: You are expected to contribute to the system architecture. You must have the "Product Mindset" to suggest design improvements that enhance user flow and system efficiency.
​How to Apply
​If you meet all the above, reply with a brief summary of a complex PHP debugging issue you solved manually. Mention your availability within the ICT timezone.

title: Web Development
description:
About the internship
Position: Full-Stack Web Development Intern
Organization: Nexero
Duration: 1 Month (Extendable up to 3 months)
Mode: Hybrid / Offline (Agartala, Tripura)

About the Role
As a Full-Stack Web Development Intern at Nexero, you will not just be "writing code" you will be contributing to the architecture of scalable digital solutions. You will work directly with our engineering team to translate complex requirements into high-performance web applications. This is an industry-immersion role designed for students who are ready to transition from classroom theory to professional software engineering.

Key Responsibilities
Backend Engineering: Develop and maintain high-performance web applications using PHP and the Laravel Framework, adhering to clean code and MVC architecture standards.

Database Management: Design, optimize, and manage RDBMS (MySQL/PostgreSQL) schemas to ensure data integrity and query efficiency.
Frontend Development: Build modern, responsive, and accessible user interfaces using HTML5, JavaScript (ES6+), and Tailwind CSS.

Version Control: Actively manage codebases using Git and GitHub, participating in branching, merging, and code review workflows.

API Development: Design and integrate RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless data communication between client-side interfaces and server-side logic.

Performance Optimization: Implement efficient algorithms and code practices to reduce latency and enhance application speed.

Collaborative Design: Translate UI/UX wireframes into functional, production-ready code.

Logistics & Schedule
Working Days: 6 days per week (Monday to Saturday).
Working Hours: 10:00 AM - 05:00 PM.
Attendance: This is a physical, on-site role. Consistency and punctuality are key indicators of performance.

What We Are Looking For
Technical Foundation: A strong grasp of PHP/Laravel and basic frontend technologies.

Version Control: Practical experience or familiarity with Git workflows.

Problem-Solving: An analytical mindset; you should be comfortable debugging and optimizing logic, not just "making it work."

Proactivity: We are a startup. We value interns who ask "why," suggest better implementations, and take ownership of their tasks.

Portfolio: A link to your GitHub profile or previous projects (University projects are acceptable).

Why Join Nexero?
Real-World Exposure: Work on live client projects, not just sandbox tutorials.

Industry Mentorship: Direct code reviews and guidance from experienced developers.

Career Growth: Receive a formal Internship Completion Certificate and, for top performers, a Letter of Recommendation (LOR).

Incentives: Performance-based rewards up to 3,000 for high-impact contributions.
How to Apply

Interested candidates should submit their resume and portfolio (or GitHub link) to: hr@nexero.co.in

title: Platform And Backend Engineer Intern At DeepMechanix
description:
About the work from home job/internship
Location: Remote, India-based US HQ: San Jose, CA Duration: 3 months, MayAugust 2026 Stipend: 75,0001,25,000/month, set on demonstrated depth Return offer eligible: Yes full-time role + RSUs for strong performers
About DeepMechanix

We are building superintelligence for the design and engineering of physical infrastructure, the hardware that civilization runs on. We are starting with static equipment: pressure vessels, heat exchangers, reactors, and related pressure-containing equipment that the global chemical, energy, and pharmaceutical industries depend on.

Engineering workflows in this domain are largely unchanged since the 1990s. Engineers transcribe datasheets by hand, perform ASME code calculations in decades-old desktop applications, and produce deliverables through manual review cycles that can take weeks. We are building the software layer that replaces the manual parts of this workflow while preserving the rigorous compliance and traceability that industrial customers require. Our first product combines custom retrieval over ASME standards with automation of engineering software. We are pre-seed with revenue, targeting a seed round in late 2026.

Our research work is being published externally. The product is live and shipping to pilot customers in India and the US.

title: Brand Management
description:
About the internship
As a brand management intern at Economic Times, you will have the opportunity to immerse yourself in the world of marketing and gain hands-on experience in managing and enhancing our brand presence. Your role will involve utilizing your expertise in social media marketing and digital marketing to create engaging content and drive brand awareness. Requirements:
1. Proficiency in Blender 3.x or 4.x at an intermediate level, including modeling, UV unwrapping, applying modifiers, and exporting FBX files.

4. Basic understanding of Unity including importing FBX and setting up materials in URP.
5. Experience with ZBrush or Sculptris for high-poly sculpting reference.

What you do not need:
1. Game development experience.
2. Coding or programming skills.
3. Prior internship experience.

title: Computer Vision And Image Processing
skills: C++ Programming,Computer Vision,C Programming,Deep Learning,Git,Linux,OpenCV,Python,Shell Scripting,Certificate,Letter of recommendation,Informal dress code,Free snacks & beverages,Job offer
description:
About the internship

    Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include:

1. Design and implement robust classical image processing techniques such as filtering, thresholding, morphological operations, and edge detection, with a strong focus on mathematical and algorithmic understanding.
2. Develop computer vision modules using OpenCV (C++/Python) for tasks including geometric transformations, feature extraction, contour analysis, and tracking, beyond simple model-based detection.
3. Work with real-world image and video datasets, performing hands-on tasks such as raw data handling, frame-wise preprocessing, noise reduction, and ROI selection     not limited to ready-made AI datasets.
4. Apply knowledge of camera geometry, epipolar constraints, and 2D/3D transformations to solve vision problems like rectification, projection, stitching, and visual alignment.
5. Implement multiview geometry concepts such as homography estimation, camera calibration, stereo vision, and structure-from-motion, with an emphasis on coding from first principles when needed.
6. Design and maintain real-time video pipelines using GStreamer or similar frameworks, handling encoding/decoding, latency control, and stream synchronization.
7. Optimize vision algorithms for real-time performance on embedded or resource-constrained platforms (e.g., Raspberry Pi, Jetson Nano), including profiling and memory optimization.
8. Collaborate with hardware and embedded systems teams to integrate vision code with peripheral devices like cameras, sensors, and processing units.
9. Write modular, well-documented, and efficient code in C++, C, or Python, with clear separation between algorithmic logic and system interfaces.
10. Evaluate, benchmark, and compare multiple vision approaches based on accuracy, speed, robustness, and resource usage, using quantitative metrics, not just visual inspection.
11. Work with image and video datasets - cleaning, labeling, augmentation, and preprocessing - and build pipelines for tasks such as object detection, segmentation, feature extraction, and tracking using PyTorch, TensorFlow, and other deep learning frameworks.
12.   Apply quantization, pruning, and knowledge distillation to improve model efficiency.
13. Implement techniques like Grad-CAM, LIME, and SHAP to explain model predictions.
14. Use Git for structured version control, including branching strategies, commit hygiene, and team-based collaboration on codebases.
15. Contribute to system-level integration of vision modules, ensuring compatibility with video input/output systems, UI components, and network interfaces.
16. Stay current with academic and industrial advances in classical vision and real-time processing, while maintaining a critical view of deep learning as one of many tools rather than the only approach.
    Skill(s) required
    
                    C++ Programming
                    Computer Vision
                    C Programming
                    Deep Learning

title: Software Development Engineer
skills: Bug Tracking,Collaboration,Computer Networking,Database Management System (DBMS),Deep Learning,FastAPI,Java,Leadership,Linux,Machine Learning,Machine Learning Operations (MLOps),Model fine-tuning,PostgreSQL,Python,REST API,Software Testing,SQL,Web development,Certificate,Letter of recommendation,Flexible work hours,Informal dress code,5 days a week
description:
About the internship

    Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities include: 

1. Build and maintain AI pipelines for short-form video auto-editing on Obula (caption generation, B-roll placement, trend analysis)
2. Integrate and optimize Whisper-based multilingual transcription supporting Indian languages (Hindi, Tamil, Hinglish)
3. Work on AI-powered creator-brand matching logic for Zypit using GPT APIs and content analysis
4. Run prompt experiments, fine-tune models, and improve output quality based on real user data
5. Collaborate closely with backend devs to deploy models on RunPod Serverless (GPU infra)
6. Manage and monitor deployments across Railway (backend), Vercel (frontend), and RunPod Serverless (GPU workers) for Obula and Zypit
7. Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment
8. Optimize Docker images for ML workers and API relay services to reduce cold start times and infra costs
9. Set up logging, error monitoring, and alerting across all services
10. Help enforce security best practices     RLS on Supabase, environment variable management, rate limiting
11. Conduct end-to-end manual testing of Obula's video editing flow and Zypit's creator-brand dashboard     document bugs with clear reproduction steps
12. Research short-form content trends across Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok to inform Obula's trend scraping and niche targeting logic
13. Analyze competitor products (editing tools, influencer platforms) and produce structured competitive research reports
14. Gather user feedback through interviews or surveys and synthesize insights for the product team
15. Help define and track product KPIs     engagement rates, edit completion rates, creator-brand match acceptance rates
    Skill(s) required
    
                    Bug Tracking
                    Collaboration
                    Computer Networking
                    Database Management System (DBMS)
                    Deep Learning
                    FastAPI
                    Java
                    Leadership
                    Linux
                    Machine Learning
                    Machine Learning Operations (MLOps)
                    Model fine-tuning
                    PostgreSQL
                    Python
                    REST API
                    Software Testing
                    SQL
                    Web development
            
    
        Earn certifications in these skills
        
            
                                    
                        Learn Deep Learning
                    
                                    
                        Learn Java
                    
                                    
                        Learn Leadership
                    
                                    
                        Learn Machine Learning
                    
                                    
                        Learn Model Fine-tuning
                    
                                    
                        Learn Model fine-tuning
                    
                                    
                        Learn PostgreSQL
                    
                                    
                        Learn Python
                    
                                    
                        Learn Software Testing
                    
                                    
                        Learn SQL
                    
                                    + 3 more skills
                            

        
    
            Who can apply
                
                    Only those candidates can apply who:
                                
                1. are available for full time (in-office) internship                    
                                    
                2. can start the internship between 26th Apr'26 and 31st May'26                    
                                    
                3. are available for duration of 3 months                    
                                    
                4. are from Bangalore only                    
                                    
                5. have relevant skills and interests                    
                                * Women wanting to start/restart their career can also apply.
                
                Other requirements
            
                                    
                    1. Candidates pursuing B.Tech/M.Tech in CS, ECE, or AI/ML preferred                
                                
                    2. Prior experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic) or video/audio processing is a strong plus                
                                
                    3. Comfortable working in a fast-paced early-stage startup environment with ownership of features                
                                
                    4. Hands-on experience with Docker, any cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Railway/Render), or GitHub Actions is a strong plus                
                                
                    5. Self-driven individuals comfortable debugging deployment issues independently                
                                
                    6. Candidates with a genuine interest in the creator economy, short-form content, or Indian social media landscape preferred                
                                
                    7. Prior experience with QA tools (Postman, BrowserStack) or product research a plus                
                                
                    8. Strong attention to detail and ability to write clear, structured reports                
                            
                Perks
    
                    Certificate
                     Letter of recommendation
                     Flexible work hours
                     Informal dress code
                     5 days a week
            
        Additional information
    
                
                
                    Stipend Structure:
                        Fixed pay: ₹ 3,000 - 5,000 /month
                    
                    
                        Incentive pay: ₹ 5,000 - 7,000 /month
                     
                
                            
        Number of openings
    
        4    
        
                    About ZYPIT                
        
        ZYPIT is an emerging organization that is a content-based digital earning platform for the people of India. People can monetize by posting content on social media.
